components.value: V, S, M (diamond dust worth 100 gp or 1,000 gp, see text) V, S

description.value: This spell functions as restoration, except it only affects an eidolon. Restore Eidolon, Lesser This spell functions as lesser restoration, except it only affects an eidolon.
